testcase.classname: DocumentationService getContent should fetch and return content from sourceUrl

testcase.classname: DocumentationService getContent should throw NotFoundException if fetching fails

testcase.classname: AuthService login should login with valid credentials

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException for invalid password

testcase.classname: AppController getHealth should return status ok
